The '''Siege of Dalron Five''' took place during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] laid siege to [[Dalron Five]] using techniques that had been developed by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]. The Empire managed to conquer the world after a devastating siege, forcing its people to flee and live as refugees.<ref name="GG1" />

These refugee-camps were later on discovered by the Imperial scout [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]], who agreed to keep their whereabouts a secret. Later on, his superiors used Sivrak's report to piece together their location and the Dalron Five refugees were finally caught. As a result of the siege and his partial responsibility for it, Dodonna would become even more determined to aid the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in its struggle to defeat the Empire.<ref name="GG1" />
